summary: Completed testing for NT Commerce Iteration 53 features: POS Session Management, Dashboard Total Cash, French language Add Product page, and Backup System. All 11 requested features verified and working correctly.

issues: Minor warning about missing Description for DialogContent elements (accessibility). This is a console warning, not a blocking issue.

critical_code_review_comments: POS session management is fully functional with open/close dialogs
Session stats bar displays نقدي (cash), دين (credit), إجمالي (total), عدد العمليات (operations count)
Dashboard total_cash correctly calculates sum of all cash box balances
French translations complete on Add Product page including all form fields
Backup system works for tenants with JSON/CSV export, import, and auto-backup settings
Note: Tenant login requires unified-login endpoint (/api/auth/unified-login) for proper tenant context
seed_data_creation: Reset password for tenant ncr@ntcommerce.com to Test@123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant ncr@ntcommerce.com password reset to Test@123. Use /api/auth/unified-login for tenant authentication. Session S001/26 is currently open with opening balance of 10,000.00 دج. Auto-backup settings saved with daily frequency at 02:00.

pos_session_management.details: Open/close session from POS page works. Session info bar shows stats (cash, credit, total, operations count). Details dialog shows full session info. Close session dialog has confirmation with closing cash input.

session_info_bar.details: Green border for open session, displays: الحصة الحالية (current session), نقدي (cash), دين (credit), إجمالي (total), عدد العمليات (operations)

open_session_button.details: Button appears when no session is open with amber warning bar

close_session_dialog.details: Dialog shows opening balance, expected cash, closing cash input with difference calculation, optional notes, confirm/cancel buttons

session_details_dialog.details: Shows session code, opening time, opening balance, cash sales, credit sales, total sales, expected in box, sales count

dashboard_total_cash.details: إجمالي النقد correctly displays sum of all cash box balances (verified via API: total_cash = sum of cash, bank, wallet, safe balances)

french_add_product_page.details: All fields translated: Ajouter un nouveau produit, Nom du produit, Code Article, Familles de produits, Image produit, Description, Prix d'achat, Super gros, Prix de gros, Prix de détail, Seuil de stock faible, Code-barres, Modèles compatibles, Annuler, Enregistrer

french_dashboard.details: Full French translations: Tableau de bord, Total caisse, Total produits, Stock faible, Total clients, Total fournisseurs, Ventes du jour, Résumé des ventes, etc.

backup_system_settings.details: Backup tab accessible in Settings under النسخ الاحتياطي. Shows last backup date, export JSON/CSV buttons, import from JSON option

json_export_import.details: Export JSON and Export CSV buttons visible. Import from JSON file option available with file selector

auto_backup_settings.details: Auto-backup section shows enable toggle, frequency selection (daily/weekly/monthly), time selection, backup count limit, settings button, and 'Backup Now' button. APIs working: GET/POST /backup/auto-settings, POST /backup/run-auto
